data.name: NoCrystalReportsMessage
data.value: System hasn't SAP Crystal Reports runtime engine for .NET Framework 4 (64-bit). This application requires the SAP Crystal Reports runtime engine for .NET Framework 4 (64-bit) v.13 or higher to be installed prior the installation process can continue

data.name: OldCrystalReportMessage
data.value: System has old version of SAP Crystal Reports runtime engine for .NET Framework 4 (64-bit). This application requires the SAP Crystal Reports runtime engine for .NET Framework 4 (64-bit) v.13 or higher to be installed prior the installation process can continue

data.name: MaxValueOfStationIdResourcesRangeLessThanMinMessage
data.value: Max value of Station ID Resources Range should be more or equal to min value

data.name: AllParametersFillingMessage
data.value: All parameters have to be filled

data.name: WrongValueForIntParameterFormatMessage
data.value: Wrong format of '{0}'. A value should be a number

data.name: WrongSqlCredentialsFormatMessage
data.value: Cannot connect to SQL server '{0}'. Login failed for user '{1}'

data.name: WrongSqlServerNameMessage
data.value: SQL server name is wrong. It can't be empty or has 'localhost' value

data.name: WrongDatabaseNameMessage
data.value: SQL server name is wrong. It can't be empty

data.name: WrongConnectionToDatabaseFormatMessage
data.value: Database '{0}' doesn't exist on '{1}' SQL server

data.name: OneParameterFillingFormatMessage
data.value: Parameter '{0}' has to be specified

data.name: PathToDataAndLogFileMessage
data.value: Specify both paths for storing new DB files, or leave the settings blank

data.name: WrongIpAddressFormatMessage
data.value: IP address '{0}' is invalid

data.name: EmptyEmailMessage
data.value: Email list has empty email

data.name: WrongEmailFormatMessage
data.value: Email list has wrong email '{0}'

data.name: UserMustBeSysAdminFormat
data.value: User '{0}' must be a member of sysadmin group

data.name: LinkedServerDoesNotExist
data.value: Linked server does not exist

data.name: LinkedServerDoesNotContainConfirmitDatabasesFormat
data.value: Specified linked server '{0}'does not contain 'confirm' or 'confirmlog' databases

data.name: LinkedServerDoesNotWorkFormat
data.value: Linked server does not work: {0}

data.name: ValueCannotBeNegativeFormat
data.value: Wrong format of '{0}'. A value cannot be a negative.

data.name: NotDefinedIsAlivePageUrl
data.value: Url to IsAlive.htm file ('Setup.IsAlivePageUrl' parameter) is not defined

data.name: NoIsAliveHtmlFileInSpecifiedLocation
data.value: IsAlive.htm file was not found in the specified location

data.name: NotDefinedIsAliveHtmlLocation
data.value: Location with IsAlive.htm file ('Setup.IsAliveHtmlLocation' parameter) is not defined

data.name: WrongConnectionToSqlServerFormatMessage
data.value: SQL Server '{0}' does not exist or access denied

data.name: DtcIsNotEnabledFormat
data.value: Distibuted transactions (DTC) does not function on the SQL server. Error message: {0}

data.name: DtcUnexpectedErrorFormat
data.value: An unexcepted error occured during verification of distributed transactions (DTC): {0}

data.name: message
data.value: ..\Files\message.ico;System.Drawing.Icon, System.Drawing, Version=4.0.0.0, Culture=neutral, PublicKeyToken=b03f5f7f11d50a3a

data.name: WrongFileNameFormat
data.value: A file name can't contain any of the following characters: {0}

data.name: CertificateFileIsNotFound
data.value: Certificate file is not found

data.name: CertificatePathIsEmpty
data.value: Path to certificate file cannot be empty

data.name: Question
data.value: Question

data.name: QuestionAboutExpiredCertificate
data.value: The selected certificate has expired. Are you sure you want to install the product anyway?

data.name: QuestionAboutSoonExpiredCertificate
data.value: The selected certificate will expire during the next {0} months. Are you sure you want to install the product anyway?

data.name: TheCertificateIsExpired
data.value: The certificate is expired

data.name: TheCertificateWillExpireSoonFormat
data.value: The certificate will expire during {0} days

data.name: WrongCertificateParametersFormat
data.value: An error occured during verification of certificate: {0}

data.name: ErrorExecutingScriptWithParameters
data.value: Error executing '{0}' with parameters: {1}

data.name: RunningOf32BitApllicationsDisabledForAppPool
data.value: Running 32-bit applications has been disabled for '{0}' app pool name. Press OK to continue

data.name: RunningOf32BitApllicationsDisabledForIIS
data.value: Running 32-bit applications has been disabled for IIS. Press OK to continue

data.name: WebSiteIsNotFound
data.value: Web site '{0}' cannot be found.

data.name: NoFramework462Message
data.value: This application requires 'Microsoft .NET Framework 4.6.2' to be installed prior the installation process can continue. It can be installed from the following link http://www.microsoft.com/en-us/download/details.aspx?id=30653
